//: Packing config for the SHD Systems Installer Kit. Copy to installer.json, edit, then run pack.ps1.
//paths: All relative paths are resolved against THIS file's folder.

version.//: Use 'file' to read version.txt, or 'literal' for a fixed string.

payload.//sources: Files/folders copied into the bundle (your already-built exes + data).
payload.//autoBundleDlls: Set true for non-Qt native apps: recursively copies non-system DLL dependencies (via objdump).
payload.//dllSearchDirs: Extra folders to resolve DLLs from when autoBundleDlls is on (e.g. a redistributable folder).

release.//: Optional generic SHD Fleet Manager release manifest metadata.

signing.//: Optional Authenticode signing to avoid SmartScreen warnings. Needs the Windows SDK (signtool).
signing.//signtool: Optional explicit path to signtool.exe; blank auto-detects (PATH, then newest Windows 10 SDK).
signing.//certFile: Path to a .pfx code-signing certificate. OR set 'thumbprint' to use one from the cert store.
signing.//certPasswordEnv: Name of the env var holding the .pfx password. NEVER put the password in this file.
signing.//azure: Azure Trusted Signing: set dlib to Azure.CodeSigning.Dlib.dll and metadata to your JSON; auth via AZURE_* env vars. Use timestampUrl http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com.
signing.//signPayload: Also sign the bundled app exes, not just the installer.
